prompt: Modify the nebula to match the sketched pillar silhouette while preserving texture.

Crucially, preserve the original intricate textures and gaseous details of the nebula during this modification, ensuring the output remains photorealistic.
objects: main dark gas and dust pillars

intricate textures within the dark pillars
